introSection: Krater is a steel roller coaster located at Parque del Café in Montenegro, Quindio, Colombia. It opened on 19 December 2014.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is a clone of Iron Shark at Galveston Island Historic Pleasure Pier in the United States.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On April 11, 2017, a 36-year-old man who previously had both his legs amputated fell from the attraction. He was treated on site and subsequently admitted to hospital with multiple injuries. The park stated that there were no mechanical problems with the ride.

fullText:
Krater is a steel roller coaster located at Parque del Café in Montenegro, Quindio, Colombia. It opened on 19 December 2014.

This ride is a clone of Iron Shark at Galveston Island Historic Pleasure Pier in the United States.



On April 11, 2017, a 36-year-old man who previously had both his legs amputated fell from the attraction. He was treated on site and subsequently admitted to hospital with multiple injuries. The park stated that there were no mechanical problems with the ride.
